title: What if Shinji and Asuka were stranded on a desert island
display_title: What if Shinji and Asuka were stranded on a desert island
wikitext:
[]: What if Shinji and Asuka were stranded on a desert island?             Quote Post by offthechainjoe » Thu Dec 31, 2009 11:34 pm Imagine this scenario: Shinji and Asuka are both stranded on a desert island, without any supplies or other materials, for 30 days. Any ideas as for what sort of things would possibly take place? (Such as Asuka yelling at Shinji to gather food, work harder, etc.)

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Thu Dec 31, 2009 11:52 pm (After 30 days of constant nagging) - Work harder! - Is Shinji Ikari going to have to choke a bitch?!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Dec 31, 2009 11:58 pm Sounds just like the ending of Evangelion except they aren't mind fucked. Pretty much Asuka being "annoyed" by Shinji's behavior, bossing him around a bit, they may get into argument here and there, later they will really understand the situation they are in. Shinji and Asuka will put their differences aside and start working together until the thirty days are up. They will get along with one another and grow closer together, to the point of maybe becoming actual friends. As the days go by they will become even more closer to one another. By the time their month together is over they will be rescued. Shinji and Asuka will be back in Tokyo-3 once more under Misato's roof. They will go back to the same old routine but retain their memories of their moments on the island together still retaining the friendship they have. They will go back to being at each others throats but not like before. They know each other a little better than they ever had before.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Fri Jan 01, 2010 12:05 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Sounds just like the ending of Evangelion except they aren't mind fucked. Pretty much Asuka being "annoyed" by Shinji's behavior, bossing him around a bit, they may get into argument here and there, later they will really understand the situation they are in. Shinji and Asuka will put their differences aside and start working together until the thirty days are up. They will get along with one another and grow closer together, to the point of maybe becoming actual friends. As the days go by they will become even more closer to one another. By the time their month together is over they will be rescued. Shinji and Asuka will be back in Tokyo-3 once more under Misato's roof. They will go back to the same old routine but retain their memories of their moments on the island together still retaining the friendship they have. They will go back to being at each others throats but not like before.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 01, 2010 12:22 am LORD OF THE FLIES.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Fri Jan 01, 2010 1:06 am Sachi wrote: LORD OF THE FLIES.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jan 01, 2010 1:07 am The same thing that happens right after EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jan 01, 2010 1:07 am Babies get maded.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 01, 2010 2:45 am It starts with them grating on each other's Nerves before they end up having hawt hawt hate/love sex in the end. And or just like EoE, although not as severe.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Jan 01, 2010 4:25 am We would have a situation that's a cross between Cast Away and Everybody Loves Raymond.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 01, 2010 7:09 am YESS! I do believe you've won the thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jan 01, 2010 8:42 am DevRei17 wrote: That sounds like the plot of an actual GOOD fan fic.

[]: Re: What if Shinji and Asuka were stranded on a desert islan             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Fri Jan 01, 2010 11:59 am offthechainjoe wrote: Imagine this scenario: Shinji and Asuka are both stranded on a desert island, without any supplies or other materials, for 30 days. Any ideas as for what sort of things would possibly take place? (Such as Asuka yelling at Shinji to gather food, work harder, etc.)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jan 01, 2010 12:17 pm Sammaeloo wrote: We would have a situation that's a cross between Cast Away and Everybody Loves Raymond.

[]:             Quote Post by cogitoergosum » Fri Jan 01, 2010 9:27 pm Ironfoot Wrote But logically, I have to say that they'd sleep together at least once.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Fri Jan 15, 2010 7:35 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Babies get maded.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jan 15, 2010 7:43 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: permission to make said fan-fic. (i'll keep it as a T rating. though id like to make it M. )

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Fri Jan 15, 2010 7:45 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: shinjidoggysasuka wrote: permission to make said fan-fic. (i'll keep it as a T rating. though id like to make it M. )
